failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation instead of supplying the required string product_id and item_id arguments needed to retrieve the item price.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The first unresolved failure occurs when the tool is invoked with malformed arguments. The ProductCatalogSearch call uses {"product_id": 0}, which is missing the required item_id and uses a non-string product_id. The runtime explicitly returns a SchemaError stating that catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id. This is not a connectivity, guardrail, or interpretation issue.
